title: rewrite model-management skill, absorb test-model
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
The skill had drifted: stale file paths, missing audio/video/embeddings coverage, no causal "if you change X, check Y" structure, overlap with `test-model`, and no field-parity audit — which is exactly what leaked `promptCachedTokens` billing earlier this year.

Rewritten end-to-end:

- §3 fixes the local topology. Gen calls Enter in only three places (`src/index.ts:78`, `src/routes/docs.ts:531`, `src/middleware/track.ts:330`) — generation itself goes direct. So local gen alone is the default for model work; you only boot Enter when the change touches dashboard / auth / pollen-pack / tier-config / tinybird-schema surfaces.
- §6 change matrix and §7 test matrix are the new daily-driver tables. Covers add / update / delete across text / image / video / audio / embeddings, including aspect ratios, voices, durations, error paths, and burst.
- §9 introduces a mandatory field-parity audit for new model and provider-change PRs. Every numeric field upstream returns must map to one of the 13 typed usage fields, a registry cost entry, an `x-usage-*` header, a Tinybird column, and a wrangler tail log. Bundled-modality exception (e.g. seedance video+audio) is documented.
- Cache HITs are correctly documented as unbilled (`track.ts:395`) — media HITs drop `x-usage-*` headers, no Tinybird row written. The four-part billing check applies to MISS only.
- `completionReasoningTokens` falls back to `completionTextTokens` by design; called out so we don't flag it as a missing rate.
- `paidOnly` gating reframed around `packBalance` (free Pollen ≠ pack balance — they're different things).
- `priceMultiplier` (current values 1 or 1.5) is now an explicit required field.
- Output-cache tests require byte-identical requests across text / image / video / audio.
- All `cd` snippets switched to subshell form `(cd dir && cmd)` per repo convention.
- `_local/.env` is the single token source: `POLLINATIONS_TOKEN_{PROD,LOCAL,STAGING}` + `TINYBIRD_READ_{PROD,STAGING}` (staging token also covers dev

gist.headline: Teaching the hive mind
gist.blurb: We've completely rewritten our internal model-management skill for Claude, merging in the test-model skill and adding strict field-parity audits. Safer, faster model updates for everyone.
gist.summary: Rewrote the internal Claude model-management skill to absorb the test-model skill, adding a mandatory field-parity audit and comprehensive change matrices across all modalities.
gist.impact: AI agents and contributors now have a single, accurate source of truth for adding or updating models, ensuring correct billing and local testing topologies.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee teaching the Monitor Robot. Polly wears tiny reading glasses and points to a glowing matrix on the robot's screen, representing the new model-management skill and test matrices.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, pointing at a glowing matrix on the screen of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot is happily holding a thick manual titled 'MODELS'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
